title: Brugada syndrome - NHS
text:

British Heart Foundation: support Cardiac Risk in the Young: support 
Recording information about you and your condition 
If you have Brugada syndrome, your care team will pass information on to the National Congenital Anomaly and Rare Disease Registration Service (NCARDRS) .
This helps scientists look for better ways to prevent and treat this condition. You can opt out of the register at any time.
Page last reviewed: 13 December 2023
Next review due: 13 December 2026
